SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
FormFillerApplication
The FormFillerApplication class is the main entry point for the JavaFX application.
FormUtils
FormUtils provides utility methods for handling form-related operations, such as updating capacity options based on selected iPhone model, converting date formats, creating toggle buttons with string properties, and validating various input formats like IBAN, IMEI, and email.
ParsingUtils
ParsingUtils provides utility methods for parsing and extracting data from images using OCR, and filling form fields with the extracted data.
PreferencesWindow
 
UserDataStore
UserDataStore is responsible for managing user credentials.
UserManager
UserManager class to manage user data.
UserManager.User
User class representing a user with an alias, username, and password.
WebScript
WebScript is a class that automates the process of filling out a web form using Selenium WebDriver.
